<issue identifier="REN-125">
<title>TC-010: Add tests for theme package</title>
<description>
## Scope

Add test coverage for the `theme/` package to satisfy the TC-010 testing target (90% for `theme/` per `CLAUDE.md`).

### Files under test

| Source | Symbols | New test file |
| -- | -- | -- |
| `theme/status.go:17` | `GetStatusStyle` | `theme/status_test.go` |
| `theme/worktype.go:49,57` | `GetWorkTypeColor`, `GetWorkTypeLabel` | `theme/worktype_test.go` |
| `theme/activity.go:8,17` | `ActivityColors`, `ActivityIcons` (map completeness) | `theme/activity_test.go` |

## Acceptance criteria

### `GetStatusStyle` (status_test.go)

Table-driven with one case per known status + an unknown sentinel.

* Known statuses: `working`, `queued`, `parked`, `completed`, `failed`, `stopped`.
* Assert `Label`, `Symbol`, `Animate`, and that `Color` equals the expected palette var (`StatusSuccess`, `StatusWarning`, `TextTertiary`, `StatusError`, `TextSecondary` for unknown).
* Assert unknown input returns `{"Unknown", TextSecondary, "?", false}`.

### `GetWorkTypeColor` (worktype_test.go)

* One case per entry in `workTypeColors` (16 keys).
* Verify returned `color.Color` equals the map entry.
* Verify case-insensitivity: `"Development"` returns the same color as `"development"` (exercises the `strings.ToLower` branch at `worktype.go:50`).
* Unknown input returns `TextSecondary`.

### `GetWorkTypeLabel` (worktype_test.go)

* One case per entry in `workTypeLabels` (16 keys).
* Verify label matches map entry.
* Verify case-insensitivity path.
* Unknown input returns the input string verbatim (passthrough at `worktype.go:61`).

### `ActivityColors` / `ActivityIcons` map completeness (activity_test.go)

* Assert `len(ActivityColors) == len(ActivityIcons)`.
* Assert every key in `ActivityColors` has a matching key in `ActivityIcons` and vice versa.
* Assert required keys are present: `thought`, `action`, `response`, `error`, `progress`.
* Spot-check one color/icon pair per key to catch silent mutations.

## Testing conventions (per [CLAUDE.md](<http://CLAUDE.md>))

* Stdlib `testing` only — **no testify**.
* Table-driven tests using `t.Run(tt.name, ...)` subtests — follow `format/format_test.go:48-55` as the shape reference.
* No golden files required for this ticket (no rendered output).
* Coverage target for `theme/`: **90%**.

## Definition of done

- [ ] `make test` passes with `-race`.
- [ ] `make coverage` shows `theme/` at ≥90%.
- [ ] `make lint` clean (govet, staticcheck, gofumpt, errcheck, gosec, gocritic, revive).
- [ ] `make fmt` leaves no diff.
- [ ] No new dependencies introduced.
- [ ] No changes to production code in `theme/`.

## Non-goals

* No tests for `theme/palette.go` — var-only declarations with nothing to assert beyond tautology.
* No tests for `theme/styles.go` — thin `lipgloss.Style` constructors; defer to a follow-up (TC-011 style) if needed.
* No refactoring of production code under test.

## Sub-issues

**None.** This scope is a single atomic PR: three sibling test files in one package with no sequencing between them. Splitting into sub-issues would add PR overhead without unlocking parallelism or reducing review risk.

## Blocking / blocked

* **Blocks:** none identified.
* **Blocked by:** none. All production symbols already exist on `main` as of commit `612f790`.
</description>
<team name="Rensei"/>
<project name="tui-components"/>
</issue>
